name: kubectl
description: Baseline governance rules for kubectl reads and cluster mutations.

rules.name: Kubectl Read Operations
rules.description: Read-oriented kubectl commands stay low risk.

rules.name: Kubectl Apply and Scale
rules.description: Apply and scale actions require approval.

rules.name: Kubectl High-Risk Commands
rules.description: Delete, patch, and rollout restart are high risk.

rules.name: Wrap Kubectl Write Operations
rules.description: Force cluster-impacting writes into wrapper mode.
